query: SELECT as2.id, as2.agent_id, as2.skill_id, as2.awake_tier, as2.use_count, as2.installed_slot, as2.acquired_at, gsc.name, gsc.wuxing, gsc.category, gsc.tier, gsc.mp_cost, gsc.skill_type FROM agent_skills as2 INNER JOIN game_skill_catalog gsc ON as2.skill_id = gsc.skill_id WHERE as2.agent_id = 8;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user PS8xt1zjvuRpYHF.3bd331015af6 --database MLF7bLVZzzxdGTPVXTct3c --execute SELECT as2.id, as2.agent_id, as2.skill_id, as2.awake_tier, as2.use_count, as2.installed_slot, as2.acquired_at, gsc.name, gsc.wuxing, gsc.category, gsc.tier, gsc.mp_cost, gsc.skill_type FROM agent_skills as2 INNER JOIN game_skill_catalog gsc ON as2.skill_id = gsc.skill_id WHERE as2.agent_id = 8;
